rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §37.055 governs parental involvement agreements for school-community guidance centers. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraisal, or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: On admitting a student to a school-community guidance center, a representative of the school district, the student, and the student's parent shall develop an agreement that specifies the responsibilities of the parent and the student.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no statutory or fiscal linkage between these provisions detected.
